command: pnpm --filter @ship/api test:coverage; pnpm --filter @ship/api exec vitest run --coverage --coverage.reporter=json-summary --coverage.reportsDirectory=../eval/results/coverage-api-after
note: Coverage provider lockfile was refreshed from @vitest/coverage-v8 4.0.16 to 4.0.17 to match vitest 4.0.17 after the first coverage run exposed the mismatch. Re-run after adding documents pagination tests.
